name: Spinach Waterenda
recipeInstructions:
1. The native way of preparing spinach with ground peanuts is more enjoyable and results in a milder flavor.
2. Cook the spinach as you normally would.
3. After cooking, strain (sieve) the spinach to remove excess liquid.
4. Mix in the ground peanuts, which have been finely ground into a flour.
(Note: The original recipe text included an attribution line that has been removed per the instructions.)
